CustomField.description: Read Only (Hiện tại) Công thức = IF (Present Rent Price != 0, Present Rent Price, IF(Total Present Rent Price != 0, Total Present Rent Price/ (Nếu là Rent Contract - Shop Mall) chia cho Area hoặc (Nếu là Rent Contract - Shophouse) thì chia cho Rent Area, 0))
CustomField.label: Rent Price (VND/m2/Month)
